items.body:
This PR reverts #37683, removing the entire `sdk/discovery/arm-discovery/` package. No new or modified public API surface exists to review — all 27 package files are deleted and only 3 infrastructure files (CODEOWNERS, ignore-links.txt, pnpm-lock.yaml) are updated. No API design or tooling issues found.
